Hotlist Policy
A hotlist is a list of license plates associated with active
police investigations including: stolen vehicles, stolen
plates, and vehicles associated with missing persons or
criminal investigations. Hotlist hits are required to be
human verified prior to any enforcement action. Once
the vehicle is no longer needed for the police
investigation, the license plate is removed from the
hotlist.
